name: input-otp-pattern
visual_summary: A 6-digit input field with a pattern of a standard text input for users to enter OTPs. This is commonly used when an app requires the user to provide a 6-digit one-time password sent through SMS for authentication or verification, but doesn't support numeric keyboards or needs an OTP that isn't just numeric.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-otp-pattern
Description: A 6-digit input field with a pattern of a standard text input for users to enter OTPs. This is commonly used when an app requires the user to provide a 6-digit one-time password sent through SMS for authentication or verification, but doesn't support numeric keyboards or needs an OTP that isn't just numeric.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: e.g. hovered-outline, keyboard-support
Tags: input, otp, text-input, numeric-input

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
